title: Sweeping Tweak
description: Gates the sword's sweep ability behind Sweeping Edge
body:
Tired of **accidentally swiping pigmen** while mid combat? Or how about **commiting friendly fire against your beloved pet wolf**; while swarmed within an army of mobs?

Look no further.

This datapack hopes to rid you of those issues, by simply making it so this dasterly sweep ability from swords, is locked snuggly behind Sweeping Edge; **Similar to the combat snapshots that Jeb was working on around 4 years ago**.


I tried making this datapack feel vanilla as possible, so if there's anything wrong, any _horrid bugs_, I apologise.
